title: Executive Secretariat Composition 2025-26 Announced
description: The composition of the Executive Secretariat of the Students' Senate for the Academic Year 2025-26 has been declared. Prof. Netai Chandra Dey has been nominated as President and Dr. Chandan Giri as Executive President by the Hon'ble Director.

title: General Council Members List 2025-26
description: The list of Members of the General Council of the Students' Senate for the Academic Year 2025-26 has been published. Please refer to Annexure-III for the full list.

title: Election Results Declared
description: The election results for the Students' Senate have been declared vide DSW/Int/149/25 dated 07/11/2025. All elected members are requested to report for the orientation session.
